hero.title: Don't work for a real estate agency.
hero.title_highlight: Operate within a Global Investment Platform.
hero.description: If you already sell real estate, advise on investments, or have a network of contacts, this is your opportunity to scale internationally without opening an office or taking on operational costs.

what_is.title: What does it mean to be a Global Agent?
what_is.subtitle: It means you can offer your clients:
offerings: Fractional models and real estate fund
what_is.no_2: Without your own legal structure in each country.
